title: Beille 23oz Silver Glass BPA Free Water Bottle with Bamboo Lid

Beille 23oz Silver Glass BPA Free Water Bottle with Bamboo Lid

Looking to increase your daily water intake? With so many benefits for your health, including sleep, weight loss, clear skin, gut health and more, add this modern and stylish silver chrome finished borosilicate glass water bottle to your daily routine!

Key Features

  • GLASS WATER BOTTLE: Made of BPA free borosilicate glass that will keep your water cooler for longer! Unique reflective chrome silver finish makes this water bottle a stylish and modern way to stay hydrated throughout the day
  • HEALTH AND HYDRATION: Water bottle holds up to 23 ounces or about three cups of water, which will encourage you to up your daily water intake; Staying hydrated is very important for skin and gut health, weight loss, sleep and much more
  • BPA FREE WATER BOTTLE: Since this water bottle is made of glass, you don’t need to worry about harmful plastic toxins like BPA; the water bottles comes with a bamboo airtight lid that will keep your liquids safe and secure during travel
  • GREAT FOR TRAVEL: Although the Beille water bottle is made of glass, it still weighs less than one pound so it won’t add too much bulk to your travel bag, purse, backpack or gym bag
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Weight: .78lbs (12.48oz); Capacity: 23oz (about 3 cups); Note: Hand wash only, for cold drinks only; Safety: Do not place in microwave

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 23047120
  • UPC: 810131703820
  • Color: Chrome
  • Size: 23 oz

This water bottle from Beille is made of thick, durable borosilicate glass, meaning that it will keep your water cooler for longer. The glass water bottle holds up to 23 ounces (about 3 cups) of water, which will encourage you to up your daily water intake. And, since this water bottle is made of glass, you don’t need to worry about harmful plastic toxins like BPA. It comes with a bamboo airtight lid that will keep your liquids safe and secure during travel, making this a great portable water bottle option!

Although the Beille water bottle is made of glass, it still weighs less than one pound so it won’t add too much bulk to your travel bag, purse, backpack or gym bag. Pack it with you to maintain hydration throughout your work or school day!

PLEASE NOTE: This water bottle is hand wash only and meant for cold drinks only; dishwasher safe. Do not put in microwave.
